en: Now there was a man of the Pharisees named Nicodemus, a ruler of the Jews.
zh: 有一個法利賽人，名叫尼哥德慕，是猶太人的官長。

en: This man came to Jesus by night and said to him, "Rabbi, we know that you are a teacher come from God, for no one can do these signs that you do unless God is with him."
zh: 他夜間來到耶穌那裡，對他說：“拉比，我們知道你是從 神那裡來的教師，因為如果沒有 神同在，你所行的這些神蹟，就沒有人能行。”

en: Jesus answered him, "Truly, truly, I say to you, unless one is born again he cannot see the kingdom of God."
zh: 耶穌回答：“我實實在在告訴你，人若不重生，就不能見 神的國。”

en: Nicodemus said to him, "How can a man be born when he is old? Can he enter a second time into his mother's womb and be born?"
zh: 尼哥德慕說：“人老了，怎能重生呢？難道他能再進母腹生出來嗎？”

en: Jesus answered, "Truly, truly, I say to you, unless one is born of water and the Spirit, he cannot enter the kingdom of God.
zh: 耶穌回答：“我實實在在告訴你，人若不是從水和聖靈生的，就不能進 神的國。

en: That which is born of the flesh is flesh, and that which is born of the Spirit is spirit.
zh: 從肉身生的就是肉身，從靈生的就是靈。

en: Do not marvel that I said to you, 'You must be born again.'
zh: 你不要因為我對你說‘你們必須重生’而感到希奇。

en: The wind blows where it wishes, and you hear its sound, but you do not know where it comes from or where it goes. So it is with everyone who is born of the Spirit."
zh: 風隨意而吹，你聽見它的響聲，卻不知道它從哪裡來，往哪裡去；凡從聖靈生的，也是這樣。”

en: Nicodemus said to him, "How can these things be?"
zh: 尼哥德慕說：“怎能有這事呢？”

en: Jesus answered him, "Are you the teacher of Israel and yet you do not understand these things?
zh: 耶穌說：“你是以色列人的教師，還不明白這事嗎？

en: Truly, truly, I say to you, we speak of what we know, and bear witness to what we have seen, but you do not receive our testimony.
zh: 我實實在在告訴你，我們知道的，才講論；見過的，就作證，然而你們卻不接受我們的見證。

en: If I have told you earthly things and you do not believe, how can you believe if I tell you heavenly things?
zh: 我對你們講地上的事，你們尚且不信，如果講天上的事，怎能相信呢？

en: No one has ascended into heaven except him who descended from heaven, the Son of Man.
zh: 除了那從天上降下來的人子 ，沒有人升過天。

en: And as Moses lifted up the serpent in the wilderness, so must the Son of Man be lifted up,
zh: 摩西在曠野怎樣把銅蛇舉起，人子也必照樣被舉起來，

en: that whoever believes in him may have eternal life."
zh: 使所有信他的人都得永生。

en: For God so loved the world, that he gave his only Son, that whoever believes in him should not perish but have eternal life.
zh: “ 神愛世人，甚至把他的獨生子賜給他們，叫一切信他的，不至滅亡，反得永生。

en: For God did not send his Son into the world to condemn the world, but in order that the world might be saved through him.
zh: 因為 神差他的兒子到世上來，不是要定世人的罪，而是要使世人藉著他得救。

en: Whoever believes in him is not condemned, but whoever does not believe is condemned already, because he has not believed in the name of the only Son of God.
zh: 信他的，不被定罪；不信的，罪已經定了，因為他不信 神獨生子的名。

en: And this is the judgment: the light has come into the world, and people loved the darkness rather than the light because their deeds were evil.
zh: 光來到世上，世人因為自己的行為邪惡，不愛光倒愛黑暗，定他們罪的原因，就在這裡。

en: For everyone who does wicked things hates the light and does not come to the light, lest his deeds should be exposed.
zh: 凡作惡的都恨光，不來接近光，免得他的惡行暴露出來。

en: But whoever does what is true comes to the light, so that it may be clearly seen that his deeds have been carried out in God.
zh: 凡行真理的，就來接近光，好顯明他所作的都是靠著 神而作的。”

en: After this Jesus and his disciples went into the Judean countryside, and he remained there with them and was baptizing.
zh: 這事以後，耶穌和門徒來到猶太地，他和他們住在那裡，並且施洗。

en: John also was baptizing at Aenon near Salim, because water was plentiful there, and people were coming and being baptized
zh: 約翰也在靠近撒冷的艾嫩施洗，因為那裡水多；眾人都去受洗。

en: (for John had not yet been put in prison).
zh: 那時約翰還沒有入獄。

en: Now a discussion arose between some of John's disciples and a Jew over purification.
zh: 約翰的門徒和一個猶太人為潔淨禮發生辯論。

en: And they came to John and said to him, "Rabbi, he who was with you across the Jordan, to whom you bore witness- look, he is baptizing, and all are going to him."
zh: 他們來到約翰那裡，對他說：“拉比，你看，從前和你在約旦河東，你為他作見證的那一位，他也在施洗，眾人都到他那裡去了。”

en: John answered, "A person cannot receive even one thing unless it is given him from heaven.
zh: 約翰回答：“除了從天上賜下來給他的，人就不能得到甚麼。

en: You yourselves bear me witness, that I said, 'I am not the Christ, but I have been sent before him.'
zh: 你們自己可以為我作證：我曾說，我不是基督，不過是奉差遣作他的先鋒的。

en: The one who has the bride is the bridegroom. The friend of the bridegroom, who stands and hears him, rejoices greatly at the bridegroom's voice. Therefore this joy of mine is now complete.
zh: 娶新娘的是新郎。新郎的好友站在那裡聽著，聽見新郎的聲音就非常喜樂。因此，我這喜樂滿溢了！

en: He must increase, but I must decrease."
zh: 他必興旺，我必衰微。

en: He who comes from above is above all. He who is of the earth belongs to the earth and speaks in an earthly way. He who comes from heaven is above all.
zh: “那從天上來的，是在萬有之上；從地上來的，是屬於地，所講的也是屬於地。那從天上來的，是超越萬有之上。

en: He bears witness to what he has seen and heard, yet no one receives his testimony.
zh: 他把所見所聞的見證出來，可是沒有人接受他的見證。

en: Whoever receives his testimony sets his seal to this, that God is true.
zh: 那接受他的見證的，就確認 神是真的。

en: For he whom God has sent utters the words of God, for he gives the Spirit without measure.
zh: 神所差來的那一位講 神的話，因為 神把聖靈無限地賜給他。

en: The Father loves the Son and has given all things into his hand.
zh: 父愛子，已經把萬有交在他手裡。

en: Whoever believes in the Son has eternal life; whoever does not obey the Son shall not see life, but the wrath of God remains on him.
zh: 信子的，有永生；不信從子的，必不得見永生， 神的震怒卻常在他身上。”
